title: Ching-ching for rare R2 coin
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A Plettenberg Bay...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A Plettenberg Bay numismatist (coin collector) is excited by a rare double-strike 1989 R2 coin which might hit the coin collectors' jackpot.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A Plettenberg Bay numismatist (coin collector) is excited by a rare double-strike 1989 R2 coin which might hit the coin collectors' jackpot."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"John Mulder, former owner of Coins International, uncovered the coin in a treasure hunt and first diagnosed it as an overstrike (coin that was struck over a previously struck coin, using the older coin as the new coin's blank)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If it is not unique and not the rarest SA numismatic coin, I certainly would like to know which coin holds that position?\" asked Mulder.","html":"\"If it is not unique and not the rarest SA numismatic coin, I certainly would like to know which coin holds that position?\" asked Mulder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said history repeated itself after a century with this R2 overstrike coin, the distant relative of the British pound and the decimal equivalent of the 1898 \"single 9 overstrike Krugerpond\" which recently sold for a staggering R41m.","html":"He said history repeated itself after a century with this R2 overstrike coin, the distant relative of the British pound and the decimal equivalent of the 1898 \"single 9 overstrike Krugerpond\" which recently sold for a staggering R41m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"A rare coin with such an elusive history of evading detection deserves preservation in a collection of famous coins,\" said Mulder.","html":"\"A rare coin with such an elusive history of evading detection deserves preservation in a collection of famous coins,\" said Mulder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One in 66 millionDescribed as akin to a \"hole-in-one\", it could be a grand slam for SA numismatics. \"No other South African legal tender currency coin escaped as many pitfalls as has this R2 overstrike coin.","html":"One in 66 million
Described as akin to a \"hole-in-one\", it could be a grand slam for SA numismatics. \"No other South African legal tender currency coin escaped as many pitfalls as has this R2 overstrike coin."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"At a rarity of one in 66 million, it is so rare and mysterious that two South African Mint officials had to make a surprise home visit to verify its existence,\" said Mulder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They documented that the 1989 R2 coin was overstruck on a 10c nickel coin, nine years after the 10c coin went out of production - adding to the mystery.","html":"They documented that the 1989 R2 coin was overstruck on a 10c nickel coin, nine years after the 10c coin went out of production - adding to the mystery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It escaped detection by Mint controls and disappeared at the bottom of the pile, looking like a mediaeval hammer struck coin.","html":"It escaped detection by Mint controls and disappeared at the bottom of the pile, looking like a mediaeval hammer struck coin."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rescued\"Its weight was the first confirmation that something was amiss and the coin spent some time in circulation without being discovered by the public,\" said Mulder.","html":"Rescued
\"Its weight was the first confirmation that something was amiss and the coin spent some time in circulation without being discovered by the public,\" said Mulder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At a quick glance it resembled a standard coin and was lost on a beach - only to be \"rescued\" from oblivion by Mulder, then a treasure hunter with a metal detector, a hobby he pursued for many years.","html":"At a quick glance it resembled a standard coin and was lost on a beach - only to be \"rescued\" from oblivion by Mulder, then a treasure hunter with a metal detector, a hobby he pursued for many years."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I scoured the press for several decades and nobody ever reported the loss of the coin and nobody reported finding a similar coin,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now in his nineties, Mulder has disposed of some assets from his Coins International days, which he closed in the late 1980s.","html":"Now in his nineties, Mulder has disposed of some assets from his Coins International days, which he closed in the late 1980s."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"When I saw the price fetched by the 1899 single 9 overstrike, I imagined this may be a good time to test the market with this R2 overstrike,\" he said.","html":"\"When I saw the price fetched by the 1899 single 9 overstrike, I imagined this may be a good time to test the market with this R2 overstrike,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mulder can be reached at [email protected].","html":"Mulder can be reached at [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The flip side of the 1989 R2 coin.","html":"The flip side of the 1989 R2 coin."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Is this a coin collector's ultimate dream?","html":"Is this a coin collector's ultimate dream?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
